productDisplayName: Levis Kids Girl's Denise Pink Kidswear
description: CompositionBaby pink dress with round neck and asymmetrical cut, made of 100% cotton, with mauve piping, embroidered and printed chest graphiti, button panel on both sides of the shoulder, and mauve bow and soft elastic gathers at the backFittingRegular15 cm Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed Use mild detergent Dry cleaning possible Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing See your little one sprint around and look like her favourite doll in this pretty pink dress. The combination of fruity yellow and bubble gum pink in the chest print with orange stitch detailing and embroidered branding add spunk to this leisure dress. Team this with comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
